# SUPERSEDED: Todo overlay mode

| Field | Value |

## Description

Detect "add to my list" or "todo" in voice input. Append to a daily todo list (same log directory). Show in morning summary.

## Superseded

Merged into `DASHBOARD-OVERLAY-TASK.md` which combines this voice intent scope with the new dashboard overlay UI.
